bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE `data_table` (`id` INT PRIMARY KEY, `value` TEXT, `created_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE `related_table` (`ref_id` INT, `description` TEXT, CONSTRAINT `fk_ref` FOREIGN KEY (`ref_id`) REFERENCES `data_table` (`id`));
